creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Is this problem still exists in the current ports tree and current version  
of FreeBSD (ie: 6.2-RELEASE, 6.2-STABLE or -CURRENT)? If it is, then  
please provide more details by follow this  
http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html (skip on gnomelogalyzer.sh  
and search in archive part, follow the rest)... It also included explain  
about that you need to recompile ports with the debugging symbols.

Cheers,
Mezz


-- 
mezz7@cox.net  -  mezz@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD GNOME Team  -  FreeBSD Multimedia Hat (ports, not src)
http://www.FreeBSD.org/gnome/  -  gnome@FreeBSD.org
http://wiki.freebsd.org/multimedia  -  multimedia@FreeBSD.org
